titleStmt.title: SII 15.614: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 614. (B.K. No. 81 of 1927-28.) ŠłĆŇĆŠĻÜI, MUNDARGI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the pedestal of the PńĀrŇõvanatha image kept in front of the MńĀruti temple.
This is dated Ňöaka 1191, Ňöukla, Chaitra Ňõu. ¬į7, Monday, MŠĻõigaŇõńęrsha, corresponding to 1269 A.D., March 11.

It records the installation of the image of PńĀrŇõvanńĀtha in the basadi of Marudńďvi-Avve of KńĀŠĻáŇęr-gaŠĻáa. The image was a gift by ŇörńękaraŠĻáada BoppaŠĻáŠĻáa, grandson of SńďnabŇćva ńÄdaŠĻáŠĻáa. The donor is described as a lay-disciple of the teacher BńĀŠł∑achandra. At this time the whole of KarŠĻáńĀta-maŠĻáŠłćala is said to have been governed by TipparńĀja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
